391496123.Name: Super Crazy Face

15013192.Name: :-O

301826957.Name: Serena’s Face

2761348544.Name: Sheriff Buffington - Face

7243931574.Name: Mon Cheri Face

10678423.Name: Bad Dog

10907532.Name: Quijibo

110336757.Name: Evil Skeptic

117522793.Name: Sadfaic
117522793.Desc: Aww... you made me sad... and I'm an ugly crier.

2830505884.Name: Ruby Archfey Visage

494291269.Name: Super Super Happy Face
494291269.Desc: I am not sure I have ever been this happy.

10831454.Name: eXtreme
10831454.Desc: "That's nothing! When I go skiing, I get dropped out of an airplane over the mountain and parachute down 45,000 feet, then I put on ONE ski and go down the mountain backward - while juggling knives. Plus, the ski is on fire AND the mountain is haunted"

45514606.Name: Crimson Laser Vision
45514606.Desc: Don't even think about looking him in the eye.  It never ends well.  Despite the smile.

10678407.Name: Sly Cat

8666744565.Name: Rainbow Spirit Face

9062620353.Name: McLaren Smile
9062620353.Desc: A big smile like you've just got pole position.

31616411.Name: Mr. Bubbles
31616411.Desc: Nothing is more fun than bubbles.  Nothing.  Except if you have other things like a ball or a pool or something.  All of those things are more fun than bubbles.

25166274.Name: Squiggle Mouth
25166274.Desc: You know what you want to say, but the right words don't come.  It's just like a comic strip.

2222775930.Name: Violet Starry Sight
2222775930.Desc:
"Starry, starry night /
Flaming flowers that brightly blaze /
Swirling clouds in violet haze."

1191136166.Desc: Don't think of them as braces, think of them as dental accessories.

119812765.Name: Purple Starface

27599954.Name: Seeing Stars

2648932224.Name: Supreme Claus - Face

406002032.Name: Sharpnine's Face of Joy
406002032.Desc: The team just wrote 4000 selenium tests and now we have full coverage! Yay!

173789498.Name: Grumpy Blox
173789498.Desc: I wouldn't be so grumpy if people weren't so stupid.

12467159.Name: Ghostface
12467159.Desc:
"Sometimes I look up at the stars and analyze the sky
And ask myself was I meant to be here... why?"

3258552764.Name: Red Sparkle Time Lobster Person - Face

835095003.Name: Blue Amazeface
835095003.Desc: "I once was lost but now am found / Was blind but now I see"

2830497827.Name: Torque the Green Orc
2830497827.Desc: These are beginning to feel a bit fORCed.

24441888.Name: Camoface
24441888.Desc: Major Major reporting for duty Sir!

880471415.Name: Death's Grin
880471415.Desc:
The Grim Reaper must go to the dentist, 'cause he's got a nice set of pearly white choppers. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

743690770.Name: BiteyMcFace
743690770.Desc:
Everyone focuses on the fangs, but the depth is in the eyes. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

8329682.Name: ZOMG
8329682.Desc:
zOMG is a varient of the all-too-popular acronym "OMG", meaning "Oh My God". 

The "z" was originally a mistake while attempting to hit the shift key with the left hand, and type "OMG" 

Also used in all-caps, 'ZOMG' is generally used in a sarcastic manner, more often than not a humiliating fasion. It is also used as a device for stating the obvious. 
"zOMG! you r teh winz!!one!!eleven!"

10907547.Name: Bird of Prey
10907547.Desc: Tastes like chicken. Fights like raptor.

141728899.Name: Drill Sergeant
141728899.Desc: What was that? Drop and give me 20!

27134344.Name: Goofball
27134344.Desc: Everybody knows a goofball.  If you don't know one, there's a good chance that you're it.

34673712.Name: Shutter Shades: The Face
34673712.Desc: Now you can wear shutter shades while you wear shutter shades!

12908359.Name: Dragonface
12908359.Desc: The face of a dragon brings luck to all.

2807218396.Name: Dr. Bunton Madmind - Face
2807218396.Desc: Being an evil genius can get expensive, but with all the times Dr. Madmind gets to scream "IT'S ALIVE!" it's probably worth it.

66330060.Name: Emerald Ambassador
66330060.Desc: "You're from a whole other world / A different dimension / You open my eyes / I'm ready to go lead me into the light"

268603331.Name: Bad News Face
268603331.Desc: So... I have to tell you something. I don't think you are going to be happy.

2627730985.Name: Astral Isle Clan: Windsor the Blue - Face

7657646351.Name: Butterfly Wink - Lil Nas X (LNX)
7657646351.Desc: Change your appearance in the wing of an eye.

2528319611.Name: Arachnid Queen
2528319611.Desc:
The power of my beauty is only surpassed by the power of my sharp little teeth injecting venom into your ankle. Ouch. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

1665511048.Name: Rogueish Good Looks
1665511048.Desc: These aren’t just regular good looks. These good looks belong to a rogue. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy! Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

15054426.Name: XD
15054426.Desc: XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD XD

42070576.Desc: ZOMG SO EPIK! SO FAIC! BUT IS IT OVAR 9000?

1016185535.Name: Emerald Evil Eye
1016185535.Desc: Cyclops are always fighting each other, because they can't see eye to eye.

2608325060.Name: Rach - Face
2608325060.Desc: Rach is always up to date with the latest trends.

30265169.Name: Robot Smile
30265169.Desc: But I AM smiling.  Can't you tell!?!

7893460486.Name: Glittering Eye - Zara Larsson
7893460486.Desc: I just ain't the shy type.

398676450.Name: Green Glowing Eyes
398676450.Desc: You're watching Netflix videos- just chillin' on a typical Friday night. You hear a sound. You look out the window. You see these green glowing eyes and nothing else.  You go outside to inspect the situation. You approach the figure. It is your best friend. He bought this face just to mess with you. Friends are weird.

7243924005.Name: Monster Grumpy Face
7243924005.Desc: Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy! Check out www.roblox.com/toys to learn more...

16678138.Name: Jungle Commando

66330231.Name: Golden Lightning Speaker
66330231.Desc: Get ready for a lightnin' storm!  Of words.  Because his mouth is a lightning bolt.

30394484.Name: Braces
30394484.Desc: Dude...gum is going to taste so good when I get these off!

2222771916.Name: Hold It In
2222771916.Desc: Never let em see you down.

34186804.Name: Disbelief Face
34186804.Desc: Dude...I can't believe that just happened!

9650713776.Name: Red Lip - Tate McRae
9650713776.Desc: Face the day with this bold shade of red.

16101765.Name: Tango
16101765.Desc: The tango has become part of the repertoire for great classical musicians. One of the first classical interpreters to do this "cross over" was the baritone Jorge Chaminé with his Tangos recording with bandoneonist Olivier Manoury. Since then, al Tango, Yo-Yo Ma, Martha Argerich, Daniel Barenboim, Gidon Kremer, Plácido Domingo and Marcelo Alvarez have performed and recorded Tangos.

835094544.Name: Green Amazeface
835094544.Desc: Amazing Face! / How sweet the sound

19264845.Name: Bubble Trouble
19264845.Desc: It's a bad idea to run and chew gum at the same time, unless you enjoy having gum stuck in your esophagus and being unable to breathe.

162200696.Name: Yellow Starface
162200696.Desc: “Moonlight drowns out all but the brightest stars.”

76382978.Name: Dr. Smyth Face
76382978.Desc: Gotta luv dah cutie face c:

2274754557.Name: Pop Queen Smilestar Spectacusmile
2274754557.Desc:
What a spectacular smile you have. It’s spectacusmile. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

24067718.Name: Drooling Noob
24067718.Desc: Uh...what? Oh slobber.... u can clean?

1016184756.Name: Crimson Evil Eye
1016184756.Desc: Iris I was as clever as you guys.

7506144.Name: I Lack Personal Confidence
7506144.Desc: This face is for people who lack personal confidence. Of course, none of those people will have the confidence required to wear this face. So for the most part, it will sit unused in your inventory forever. Still, would you rather be yourself, or hide behind a different, cooler face that doesn't reflect who you are? Now I know what you are thinking: "this is a videogame, don't ask me to think about deep introspective issues." Well, I refuse. Videogames can be art and one of the purposes of art is to ask uncomfortable questions. WE are the music makers. WE are the dreamers of dreams. Don't wake me.

280988698.Name: Super Happy Joy
280988698.Desc: I have never known a greater joy. Can't you see it in my eyes!?!  Note - eyes are super large and may not work with some other ROBLOX items.

10831438.Name: Shy Lady
10831438.Desc: She gets nervous when you look at her.

362051644.Name: Cheerful Hello
362051644.Desc: I'm the friend that's always happy to see you!

3690515434.Name: Sorority Star Face
3690515434.Desc:
Hi, sisters! I’ve got my face on and I’m ready to go. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

2222775067.Name: Blue Starry Sight
2222775067.Desc:
"Starry, starry night/
Paint your pallet blue and grey."

6590375198.Name: Princess Alexis
6590375198.Desc: Make friends with all the deer, rabbits, and songbirds. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy! Check out www.roblox.com/toys to learn more...

10678427.Name: RAWR Bear
10678427.Desc: RAWR Bear is just like the Carebears, only he eats Carebears.

76233968067050.Name: Snowflake Eyes
76233968067050.Desc: A look that’s as cold as ice.

141728790.Name: Tired Face
141728790.Desc: I'm so tired...can I go to bed now?

28119051.Name: Not Again!
28119051.Desc: I can't believe my sister threw away my homework again! Grrr.....

21352013.Name: Downcast
21352013.Desc:
"It's snowing still," said Eeyore gloomily.
"So it is."
"And freezing."
"Is it?"
"Yes," said Eeyore. "However," he said, brightening up a little, "we haven't had an earthquake lately."

3210252812.Name: Chichiri the Wise Youkai Face
3210252812.Desc: "We are not meant to live apart from eachother. No man is perfect, so we need one another."

51241171.Name: Sunny Fun
51241171.Desc: Such a beautiful sunny day - such a beautiful sunny face!

6532619915.Name: Sparkling's Friendly Wink
6532619915.Desc: Rumors say if you wink three times, sparkles will appear... Just trust me. Art by Mugalo. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy! Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

173789324.Name: Not sure if...
173789324.Desc: Not sure if serious or just trolling.

2517242922.Name: Wyldfire Fairy - Face
2517242922.Desc: She is the keeper of the eternal flame.

3131093524.Name: Druid of the Stag Face
3131093524.Desc: Part of the Druid of the Stag bundle.

29532363.Name: Vampire
29532363.Desc: He can only go outside in daylight during a total eclipse.

119812738.Name: Green Starface
119812738.Desc: "One may understand the cosmos, but never the ego; the self is more distant than any star."

28878297.Name: Adoration
28878297.Desc: You just shook hands with your hero.  This is what your face looks like.

159199178.Name: Classic Alien Face
159199178.Desc: Bring back life form. Priority One. All other priorities rescinded.

5122343618.Name: Performing Mime

For this adorable mime face, no words are needed. (Invisible wall not included.) Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

14405720.Name: No Z
14405720.Desc: Do you want to know why the slow kids still don't get it? Mind your own business.

880474146.Name: Squinty Assassin Face

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

11123827.Name: Mr. Oinkers
11123827.Desc: Mr. Oinkers is full of delicious bacon. Let's get him.

162200633.Name: Crimson Starface
162200633.Desc:
“I have walked a stair of swords,
I have worn a coat of scars.
I have vowed with hollow words,
I have lied my way to the stars"

1665629400.Name: Rainbow Barf Face
1665629400.Desc: At least it’s not double rainbow barf. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy! Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

323191430.Name: Daring Blonde Beard Face
323191430.Desc: The toughest guy on ROBLOX just walked up to you.  He's got a blonde beard.

20298988.Name: Puck
20298988.Desc:
Captain of our fairy band, /
Helena is here at hand, /
And the youth, mistook by me, /
Pleading for a lover's fee. /
Shall we their fond pageant see? /
Lord, what fools these mortals be!

387256603.Name: Silver Punk Face
387256603.Desc: Silver is very punk. Like classic, "I pierced my own tongue in an alley with this staple", kind of punk. Obviously you should not do this in real life.

14030577.Name: I Hate Noobs
14030577.Desc: Everyone on the internet is a noob but me.

23310997.Name: Paintball Enthusiast
23310997.Desc: A sport that could only be invented in America...

380754227.Name: Green Bubble Trouble
380754227.Desc: They say everyone is Irish on St. Patrick's Day. I guess that is also true for gum.

7074814.Name: Existential Angst
7074814.Desc: Oh man, I feel so bad about everything.

10907536.Name: Slobbery Villain
10907536.Desc: Take my money, but don't drool on me!

3210253450.Name: Noriko the Gentle Youkai Face
3210253450.Desc: Sometimes... things that appear one way... are not as they seem...

14861743.Name: :P
14861743.Desc: When you are feeling :P there's really no other way to describe it.

260304187.Name: Purple Trance
260304187.Desc: Man, I love creamsicles.  I just ate a lot of them. I'm feeling a bit strange actually.  Do you see that? It's magical. Like all the good things about the universe morphed into a giant creamsicle of joy. This is pretty much the best day of my life.

7243865988.Name: Persephone's Girl Glam
7243865988.Desc:
Cat eye for life. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy! Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

Face artwork created by @DopeSir

244160970.Name: Blue Trance
244160970.Desc: Man, I love creamsicles.  I just ate a lot of them. I'm feeling a bit strange actually.  Do you see that? It's magical. Like all the good things about the universe morphed into a giant creamsicle of joy.

494299198.Name: Serious Red Eye Scar
494299198.Desc: The world is a dangerous place for your face.

10831558.Desc: Ok. For the sake of argument, let's say you're wrong and money IS everything.

2535457291.Name: Knights of Redcliff: General - Face
2535457291.Desc: The Redcliff General commands with respect and strength.

20909103.Name: Sweat It Out
20909103.Desc: Yes, sometimes it is as bad as it looks.

386188363.Name: Blue-eyed Awesome Face
386188363.Desc: The face you make when something is awesome and you have blue eyes. This item came out of the Faces of Awesome Basket on March 24th, 2016.

2907632781.Name: Valkyrie of the Splintered Skies - Face

25556219.Name: Freckled Cheeks
25556219.Desc: A face without freckles is like a sky without stars.

238983378.Name: Sly Guy Face
238983378.Desc: He's getting away with something... you just don't know what yet.

1384270693.Name: Tohru: The Phantom Claw's Face
1384270693.Desc: Part of the Tohru: The Phantom Claw package

7506136.Name: Emotionally Distressed Zombie
7506136.Desc: I mean, how would you feel if all the brains were gone and the villagers were chasing you around town with pitchforks?

16652251.Name: Red Tango
16652251.Desc: "Red Tango" is actually a code name, and you are actually a spy for Her Majesty's Secret Service. Your cover is that you are an amazing Tango dancer.

15366173.Desc: For when your day is totally awesome! Which is pretty much everyday on ROBLOX.

2859557339.Name: Gwen "Axe Angel" Rosewood - Face
2859557339.Desc: You'll see plenty of stumps in Tupperview Woods, but when you come across a clearing with stumps that are clean and smooth, that'll be the work of the Axe Angel.

7699183.Name: Poor Man
7699183.Desc: He looks sad because he spent all his money on this face. I don't know why you would do that, so it's really his own fault, don't you think?

440739783.Name: Green Galaxy Gaze
440739783.Desc: "Give me time to make a few dreams come true / Flaming star"

7074786.Name: Check It
7074786.Desc: I'm hip. I'm with it. I'm a whole new me!

5122355742.Name: Zed Face
5122355742.Desc:
People know you mean business with those those markings because they don't wash off. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

24126147.Name: Zip It!
24126147.Desc: Zip it, shut it, lock it up and throw away the key!

376812961.Name: Purple Super Happy Joy
376812961.Desc: The joy you feel when you ride the miniature train at Zilker Park and it's free breakfast taco day. I didn't even know there was a thing called free breakfast taco day!

416846300.Name: Anime Surprise
416846300.Desc: Surprise, surprise, anime surprise, how many heroes are still alive!?  There could be three, or four, or five!

9156275069.Name: Golden Eyes - 24kGoldn
9156275069.Desc: Dreamy golden eyes always in my head.

2830496106.Name: Torque the Blue Orc
2830496106.Desc: Some of these puns are making me feel sort of orcward...

49493376.Name: Eyes of Crimsonwrath
49493376.Desc: In this house, young lady, we obey the Second Law of Thermodynamics!

2648912542.Name: Pepper Krinklesnaps - Face
2648912542.Desc: You can always expect Pepper to crank out the most toys made every year. Her competitive nature makes her a little spicy, but her Christmas cheer keeps her sweet.

2517188619.Name: Rock Star Singer - Face
2517188619.Desc: The rock you bring won't mean a thing unless you sing, sing, sing, sing, sing!

15133453.Desc: A dignified kind of sorrow.  A single tear rolls down your face - you're sad, but not too sad.

301826803.Name: Lin's Face
301826803.Desc: Part of the Lin Package available exclusively on Xbox One.

2517100778.Name: Squad Ghouls: Zoe Saberhagen - Face
2517100778.Desc: Zoe might not fit in with the popular ghouls, but she'll really put a spell on you.

10860391.Name: Pumpkin Face
10860391.Desc: No, we couldn't save it until Halloween. That's, like, months away. You'll just have to deal.

2553655919.Name: Alexandra Ninniflip - Face
2553655919.Desc: Malfunctioning flight contraption got you grounded? Don't worry - Alex will get you back in the air!

2553407112.Name: Beekeeper - Face
2553407112.Desc: Not only is he their keeper, but he is also a friend to the bees!

13656095.Name: Pony Face
13656095.Desc: Why the long face?  Because I'm a pony! That's why!

2830499980.Name: Emerald Archfey Visage
2830499980.Desc: She's got a lot of elf-confidence.

7243836687.Name: Bakonette
7243836687.Desc: The more you stare, the scarier it gets. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy! Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

2646380181.Name: Yeti Hunter Face
2646380181.Desc: That yeti wont escape me this time! Part of the Yeti Hunter bundle.

22587894.Name: Fast Car
22587894.Desc: Dude. I think Matt Dusek just lapped you.

2535415411.Name: C.Y.N.D.I - Face
2535415411.Desc: Login successful. Welcome, Player 230. Initiating directory listing.

110288865.Name: Evil Skeptic Face
110288865.Desc: He's not so sure he believes you.  That's okay, you don't believe him either.

7389923463.Name: Warpaint Josh Dun - Twenty One Pilots

3013806177.Name: Futureglam Bounty Hunter Face
3013806177.Desc: Sure, a bounty hunter is expensive. But they're worth every penny. Part of the Futureglam Bounty Hunter bundle.

880473016.Name: Sapphire Gaze
880473016.Desc:
Get the look. Own the attitude. Strike a pose. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

7389910081.Name: Sai-eye Tyler Joseph - Twenty One Pilots

1428424821.Name: Purple Mermaid Princess
1428424821.Desc: I do not think they will sing to me.

17999992.Name: Eyes of Azurewrath
17999992.Desc: What terrible secrets hide behind those eyes?

2845812591.Name: Pizza Face
2845812591.Desc:
I don’t need a napkin, I’m saving it for later. 
 Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

34871168.Name: Magical Dragon
34871168.Desc: Lives by the sea.  Interests include frolicking in the the autumn mist, strings, sealing wax, and other fancy stuff.

416846000.Name: Yellow Glowing Eyes
416846000.Desc: You're watching Hulu- just chillin' on a typical Friday night. You hear a sound. You look out the window. You see these yellow glowing eyes and nothing else. You go outside to inspect the situation. You approach the figure. It is your best friend. He bought this face just to mess with you. Friends are weird.

398675764.Name: Nouveau George
398675764.Desc: He's back and he's still furious...

2761366151.Name: Overseer: Assassin - Face
2761366151.Desc: An Assassin has complete lack of fear, abandoning their emotions to fulfill their master’s bidding, thus becoming a lethal warrior for the Overseer.

11389372.Name: Adorable Puppy
11389372.Desc: Awww! Look at the adorable puppy! He needs a home!

10770395.Name: Skeletar
10770395.Desc: Skeletar will destroy you, puny weakling.

4645966393.Name: Mixologist's Smile
4645966393.Desc:
Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out www.roblox.com/toys to learn more...

301827089.Name: Claire's Face
301827089.Desc: Part of the Claire Package available exclusively on Xbox One.

3210252000.Name: Eita the Envious Youkai Face
3210252000.Desc: Wipe that smirk off your face...

7074944.Name: Uh Oh
7074944.Desc: Perfect for when a meteor is about to hit your house, or it's raining acid and you don't have an umbrella, or for when you're surrounded by flames, or when an army of several thousand armed horsemen is about to crush you, or for when an avalanche of boulders is about to crush you, or for when you're facing anything worse than any of those things. Yes, "Uh Oh" indeed.

22877700.Name: Whistle
22877700.Desc: Perfect for a corporate whistle blower or perhaps just a whistling enthusiast.

12145366.Name: Freckles
12145366.Desc: People with freckles are more sensitive to the sun. Except in ROBLOX where people are generally made out of plastic.

406000730.Name: Happy :D
406000730.Desc: Times when the :D is appropriate: 1) It's a summer day! 2) Free popsicles! 3) You found this really cool place to build stuff and hang out with your friends!

402304145.Name: Friendly Trusting Smile
402304145.Desc: Not evil and not skeptic... still creepy though...

209994875.Name: Smiling Girl
209994875.Desc: Got nothing to do today but smile!

255827175.Name: Serious Scar Face
255827175.Desc: He's seen things you can only imagine. Dangerous things.

20052135.Name: Prankster
20052135.Desc: You didn't believe your mom when she said your face would freeze like that.  Oops!

10770432.Name: Retro Smiley
10770432.Desc: Remember when 512 KB was enough for anybody?

29296146.Name: Daydreaming
29296146.Desc:
Cheer up, Sleepy Jean /
Oh, what can it mean /
To a daydream believer /

11611321.Name: Love
11611321.Desc:
Maria:
Oh my hero, so far away now.
Will I ever see your smile?
Love goes away, like night into day.
It's just a fading dream. 

I'm the darkness, you're the stars.
Our love is brighter than the sun.
For eternity, for me there can be,
Only you, my chosen one... 

Must I forget you? Our solemn promise?
Will autumn take the place of spring?
What shall I do? I'm lost without you.
Speak to me once more!

How can you judge me after the mildly surprising thing you just told me?  Be cool, man.

209994929.Name: Suspicious

334656210.Desc: Frankly my dear, you look ready for anything.

7075089.Desc: Stop talkin' crazy! I ain't even foolin'

835095880.Name: Rose Amazeface
835095880.Desc: "'Tis Grace has brought me safe thus far / And Grace will lead me home"

100290429.Name: iFace
100290429.Desc: ROBLOX's first iOS exclusive face.  Get it soon - only available through our mobile app. Get more details here - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/roblox-mobile/id431946152?mt=8

2517386054.Name: Baroness Callidora - Face
2517386054.Desc: The worst part of being a vampire? Trying to get blood stains off a 300 year old fainting couch.

2506721000.Name: Knight of Splintered Skies Ascendant - Face

180660043.Name: Red Glowing Eyes
180660043.Desc: You're watching Amazon Prime videos- just chillin' on a typical Friday night. You hear a sound. You look out the window. You see these red glowing eyes and nothing else.  You go out side to inspect the situation. You approach the figure. It is your best friend. He bought this face just to mess with you. Friends are weird.

16723499.Name: Ochre Ogre
16723499.Desc: "Ochre" is a fancy word for "yellowish brown" and "Ogre" is a fancy word for "someone with poor temperment and dental hygiene".

6590371677.Name: Super Pink Heart Makeup

22070623.Name: The First Time I Ever Played ROBLOX...
22070623.Desc: So when I joined ROBLOX in June 2006, we had just released multiplayer games. Back then we had 0 players. When a player logged in, the whole office would stop working to get in game to make sure (s)he had someone to play with. We even considered hiring a high school kid to play ROBLOX all summer as a job.

209994074.Name: Sapphire Laser Vision
209994074.Desc: Because Emerald Laser Vision is so three years ago.

116043052.Name: Rosey Smile
116043052.Desc: I make this face when I think about pizza.

49045351.Desc: He's in your house, readin' your monster manual.  Wait.. why do you have a monster manual in your house?

10907541.Desc: Don't let his disarming grin fool you. This man is dangerous.

10678418.Name: Serious Dog
10678418.Desc: Serious Dog doesn't care what you think.

10907551.Name: Dizzy Face
10907551.Desc: You're cynical and beautiful / You always make a scene / You're monochrome delirious / You're nothing that you seem

238983270.Name: Purple Butterfly Smile
238983270.Desc: I'm pretty sure a butterfly landing on you means good luck! Purple butterfly is extra good luck!

2667060123.Name: Knights of Redcliff: Elite Dragoon - Face

362051773.Name: Eyes of Everflame
362051773.Desc: The flames of 1000 years burn in his eyes.

445117183.Name: Red White and Starface
445117183.Desc: The red and white and starry blue / Is freedom's shield and hope.

1428417334.Name: Teal Mermaid Queen
1428417334.Desc: I have seen them riding seaward on the waves.

301827199.Name: John's Face
301827199.Desc: Part of the John Package available exclusively on Xbox One.

7506135.Name: Blinky
7506135.Desc: Blinky the Fish (or simply Blinky) is a three-eyed orange fish, found in the ponds and lakes of Springfield.

19381787.Name: Pieface Jellyfreckles
19381787.Desc: Give a man a pie, he eats for a day. Teach a man to make pies and his house smells delicious forever!

323191787.Name: Green Whatchoo Talkin' Bout
323191787.Desc: But seriously... what are you talking about?

29109681.Name: Trance
29109681.Desc: You looked too deep into his eyes.  Now you're in an unbreakable trance!

16723481.Name: Sapphire Drool
16723481.Desc: Like the tears of an angel.

2409285794.Name: Playful Vampire
2409285794.Desc: But first, let me take a skellfie, because I look so good it's scary.

2761426133.Name: Knights of Redcliff: Warrior - Face
2761426133.Desc: Warriors are the most courageous and fiercest protectors of the weak. Their loyalty lies with their people and comrades.

616381207.Name: Friendly Smile
616381207.Desc: Everything is more fun with a friend!

406000421.Name: Red Serious Scar Face
406000421.Desc: He's seen things you couldn't even imagine. Recently. You know that 'cause the scar is still red.

45084008.Name: Angelic
45084008.Desc: He may have the face of an angel, but he can play the fiddle like the devil himself.

2493717709.Name: The High Seas: Beatrix The Pirate Queen - Face

1428409936.Name: Blue Rock Star Smile
1428409936.Desc: “No one knows what it's like / To be the tough guy / To be the wise guy / Behind blue eyes.”

32058239.Name: So Funny
32058239.Desc: Okay...so maybe you had to be there.

880469676.Name: Winning Smile
880469676.Desc:
You're happy, you're friendly, or you're just up to something. Get this exclusive item when you redeem a code from a Roblox toy!

Check out roblox.com/toys to learn more...

22500129.Name: The Friendly Eviscerator
22500129.Desc: He just wants to be friends, and maybe eat you.

11453609.Name: Ninja
11453609.Desc: He'll ninja you with all his mighty ninjaness.

7076076.Name: Hmmm...
7076076.Desc: You have given me much to ponder!

2807183388.Name: Lady Darkshade - Face
2807183388.Desc: The darkness is strong and unpredictable. Only those that master the dark can truly wield its power and Lady Darkshade is one of the few.

399021751.Name: Bacon Face
399021751.Desc: I'm bacon you to cut these puns out.

6531983163.Name: Award-Winning Smile
6531983163.Desc: Check out those famous good looks. Awarded to anyone who visited the Hall of Fame in the 8th Annual Bloxy Awards experience.

2517364030.Name: Fearless Ocean Diver - Face
2517364030.Desc: The sea is full of sunken wonders, and I aim to find them all!

15885121.Name: Cutiemouse
15885121.Desc: Cutiemouse is adorable. You love cutiemouse. Give cutiemouse all your guns...

66330165.Name: Emerald Laser Vision
66330165.Desc: Because Crimson Laser Vision is so last year.

2986536321.Name: Octavia, The Ivory Spider Girl - Face

130213380.Name: ROBLOX Madness Face
130213380.Desc: I'm just mad about ROBLOX!  This face will only be available during Virtual BLOXcon.
